summary: Comprehensive testing of SignalBeast Pro trading platform completed. Backend: 30/31 tests passed (97%). Frontend: All pages and features working correctly. Real-time market data streaming with 25 crypto, 12 forex, and 44 Indian market assets.

minor.issue: Initial request may return empty arrays if called before ticker initialization completes (~3-5 seconds after server start)
minor.note: This is expected behavior - the ticker needs time to fetch data from external APIs

backend: GET /api/market/live - returns crypto (25), forex (12), indian (44) data
GET /api/market/forex - returns 12 forex pairs with live prices
POST /api/auth/register - creates new user with JWT token
POST /api/auth/login - authenticates user and returns token
GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with valid token
GET /api/portfolio/summary - returns portfolio summary with totals
POST /api/chat - sends message and gets AI response
frontend: Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
Auth page with Login/Register tabs and Google OAuth
Dashboard page with live ticker, summary cards, BTC chart, gainers/losers
Markets page with Crypto/Forex/Indian tabs and live data
Portfolio page with add holding dialog, holdings table, allocation chart
Alerts page with create alert dialog, active/triggered alerts
Beast AI Chat page with input and suggestion buttons
Settings page with profile, notifications, security sections
Notification bell with dropdown and mark as read

seed_data_creation: Created test user, portfolio holdings, and price alerts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Real-time price streaming via HTTP polling (useMarketStream hook polls /api/market/live every 1.5s). Price alerts checked every 5 ticks. Notification bell polls every 10s. The one test failure was a timing issue - market data needs ~3-5 seconds to initialize after server restart.

features_verified.real_time_data: Live prices with 1-2 second refresh rates
features_verified.dashboard: Ticker tape, summary cards, BTC chart, gainers/losers, LIVE indicator
features_verified.markets: All 3 tabs (Crypto/Forex/Indian) with search and watchlist add
features_verified.portfolio: Add/delete holdings, live P&L calculation, allocation chart
features_verified.notifications: Bell icon, unread count badge, dropdown with mark as read
features_verified.signals: AI signal generation with confidence ring
features_verified.chat: Beast AI chat with session continuity
